creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

The perfect glamping experience exists in Osprey, Florida! Come with me to go glamping with Timberline Sarasota in Oscar Scherer State Park! 

🏕️Miles of hiking and biking trails
🏕️Go kayaking or canoeing 
🏕️Stargaze at night and make smores 
🏕️Minutes from Venice and Sarasota 

Have you ever been glamping? 

Send this to a friend you want to go glamping with! 

#glamping #floridacamping #oscarscherer #floridastateparks #floridahiddengems

transcription.text: Did anyone else know you can go glamping just 20 minutes from Sarasota in a state park? I recently glamped for the first time at Oscar Shear State Park in Osprey, Florida with Timberline Glamping. I stayed at Site 20 in the Deluxe Safari Tent, which was a really beautiful and well-appointed tent. This site is very private and sits right on a creek that you can fish in. The tent has a king-size hotel-quality bed and two sets of bunk beds, so it's perfect for families. It also has a Keurig machine with pods and mugs, which I appreciated, a refrigerator, and most importantly, air conditioning. Outside you have a hammock, Adirondack chairs, a picnic table, a charcoal grill, and a fire pit for s'mores. Now, there's no running water in the glamping tent, but the bathrooms and showers were just a short walk away. Since this is a state park, there are so many walking and biking trails, and you can kayak or canoe. This park's location is perfect because you're just 10 minutes away from Venice and 15 minutes away from Sarasota. I'd suggest checking out historic downtown Venice where you'll find restaurants and shopping or go shark tooth hunting on Venice Beach. If Sarasota is more your vibe, you could go to the Ringling Museum or Selby Botanical Gardens. If you're the adventurous type or just looking for a unique experience where you can disconnect from the world for a while, glamping might just be for you. Send this to a friend you want to glamp with and follow along for more great Florida content from a local.
